qa_pairs.question: How can Alliance researchers access Ansys programs in graphical mode on the NIBI cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Alliance researchers can access Ansys programs in graphical mode on the NIBI cluster by visiting `https://ondemand.sharcnet.ca` to use an OnDemand desktop.

qa_pairs.question: What types of desktop environments are used to run Ansys programs graphically on Alliance clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: Ansys programs can be run in graphical mode using either an OnDemand or Jupyterhub desktop environment on Alliance clusters.
